creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #36)
> @Romain Shouldn't this (ports r480661) be merged to quarterly?

Probably?  Dima (@fluffy) did all the work and I just tested and committed his patches, so I am assigning the issue to him because I feel clueless for too long time with this issue :-)
